common.condition_behavior_description: How the power value should match on the targeted entities.
common.condition_threshold_description: What to test for and threshold values.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.
common.trigger_threshold_changed_description: Which changes to trigger on and threshold values.
common.trigger_threshold_crossed_description: Which threshold crossing to trigger on and threshold values.

is_value.description: Tests the power value of one or more entities.
is_value.name: Power value

changed.description: Triggers after one or more power values change.
changed.name: Power changed

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more power values cross a threshold.
crossed_threshold.name: Power crossed threshold
